subcodes.first_line: The Divine Tablets, even as torrential rain, have been sent down from the heaven of God's Will upon all the peoples of the world in sacred books and scrolls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الواح الهیه بمثل غیث هاطل از سماء مشیت الهی نازل جمیع خلق عالم را در کتب و صحف
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @power of the Manifestation of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
